tickets.title: Compact context and handoff export for session transitions
tickets.description: Implement compact context generation and handoff export to reduce context loss between sessions while keeping output minimal and reusable.
acceptance_criteria: A compact context is generated and stored in state under compact_context
A context.compact journal event is recorded with metadata
Handoff export returns a short markdown summary and can optionally write .agent/handoff.md
Unknown events remain safely ignored

tickets.title: Resume brief for in-session self-driving
tickets.description: Add a short resume brief that summarizes last state, open task, and next action without long output.
acceptance_criteria: ops_resume_brief returns a short template-based summary
Summary uses replayed state and avoids long diffs
Output size is bounded

tickets.title: Update .rules workflow for handoff and summaries
tickets.description: Improve the .rules guidance to include handoff checks and task summaries with token-saving guidance.
acceptance_criteria: .rules template includes handoff pre-check steps
.rules template includes task-end summary step
Token-saving guidance is documented

tickets.title: Token reduction controls in summaries and truncation
tickets.description: Add configurable truncation and diff-stat preference to reduce output size across tools.
acceptance_criteria: Truncation limits can be set per tool call
Summary generation prefers diff-stat over full diff
Task summaries remain short and template-based

tickets.title: Extend state model and event application
tickets.description: Expand replayed state with task fields, plan steps, artifact summary, last verification, and failure reason.
acceptance_criteria: Default state includes new fields with safe defaults
Event application updates new fields where applicable
Continue state rebuild preserves compatibility with old snapshots

tickets.title: Add high-level ops tools for task lifecycle
tickets.description: Implement ops_start_task, ops_update_task, ops_end_task, ops_capture_state, ops_task_summary in tool registry.
acceptance_criteria: All ops_* tools are registered and callable
Each tool records appropriate journal events
ops_capture_state updates snapshot and checkpoint

tickets.title: Lightweight observability summaries
tickets.description: Provide recent-event and failure summaries without external services.
acceptance_criteria: Recent journal events can be summarized into short output
Failure reasons are surfaced from replayed state
Artifacts are summarized by path only

tickets.title: Tests and documentation for v0.2.0 additions
tickets.description: Add tests for new tools and update README usage examples.
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests cover compact context, resume brief, and ops tools
README includes minimal usage examples for new ops tools
All tests pass
